payload.answer: Article ingestion aborted due to malformed URL and network failure. No memory committed. Repair options: [1] Validate URL format before submission, [2] Use URL-encoded format for special characters, [3] Confirm article existence via alternative source.

entity_resolution.reason: URL contains invalid characters (hyphen after 'https') and cannot be resolved. No durable memory committed.

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at malformed URL (punctuation/format error: 'https -//examplecom/missing'). Network error (404) encountered during mock fetch attempt.

details: URL parsing failed: 'https -//examplecom/missing' is not a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL.
Network error (404) during mock fetch (expected due to malformed input).
No memory cards committed to durable storage.

repair_options: Use URL-encoded format for special characters (e.g., 'https%20-%2F%2Fexamplecom%2Fmissing')
Confirm article existence via alternative source (e.g., search engine or direct query)
Log malformed URL attempts for pattern analysis
